prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that compares a steep descent path and a gentle descent path on the same 3D surface. Keep the explanatory table and captions fixed in the frame so the camera can orbit without making the labels hard to read.
completion:
from manim import *

class FixedFrameSurfaceDescentStory(ThreeDScene):
    def construct(self):
        def z_fn(u, v):
            return 0.18 * u**2 + 0.08 * v**2 + 0.12 * np.sin(u - 0.5 * v)

        title = Text("Readable Overlays for a 3D Descent Story", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        table = MathTable([["path", "behavior"], ["steep", "quick drop"], ["gentle", "longer glide"]], include_outer_lines=True).scale(0.4).to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.55)
        row_steep = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[1], color=YELLOW_D, buff=0.05)
        row_gentle = SurroundingRectangle(table.get_rows()[2], color=TEAL_D, buff=0.05)
        caption_a = Text("The full surface gives global context before the paths begin to move.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("The steep route drops height quickly, but the gentle route stays readable too.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Keeping the text fixed in frame avoids the tilted-label problem during camera motion.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group_a = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_a, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_a)
        caption_group_b = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_b, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_b)
        caption_group_c = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_c, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_c)
        caption_group_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_group_c.set_opacity(0)
        self.add_fixed_in_frame_mobjects(title, table, caption_group_a, caption_group_b, caption_group_c)

        axes = ThreeDAxes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], z_range=[0, 2.8, 0.5], x_length=7.0, y_length=6.5, z_length=4.2)
        surface = Surface(lambda u, v: axes.c2p(u, v, z_fn(u, v)), u_range=[-2.7, 2.7], v_range=[-2.7, 2.7], resolution=(20, 20), checkerboard_colors=[BLUE_D, BLUE_E], fill_opacity=0.72)
        steep_path = ParametricFunction(lambda t: axes.c2p(2.1 - 2.7 * t, 0.4 - 0.3 * t, z_fn(2.1 - 2.7 * t, 0.4 - 0.3 * t)), t_range=[0, 1], color=YELLOW_D)
        gentle_path = ParametricFunction(lambda t: axes.c2p(2.2 - 3.3 * t, 1.9 - 1.8 * t, z_fn(2.2 - 3.3 * t, 1.9 - 1.8 * t)), t_range=[0, 1], color=TEAL_D)
        steep_probe = Dot3D(axes.c2p(2.1, 0.4, z_fn(2.1, 0.4)), color=YELLOW, radius=0.07)
        gentle_probe = Dot3D(axes.c2p(2.2, 1.9, z_fn(2.2, 1.9)), color=TEAL_D, radius=0.07)

        self.set_camera_orientation(phi=64 * DEGREES, theta=-52 * DEGREES)
        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(table), FadeIn(caption_group_a), Create(axes), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(surface), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(steep_path), FadeIn(steep_probe), Create(row_steep), FadeOut(caption_group_a), FadeIn(caption_group_b), run_time=4)
        self.begin_ambient_camera_rotation(rate=0.12)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(steep_probe, steep_path), run_time=5, rate_func=linear)
        self.play(Create(gentle_path), FadeIn(gentle_probe), ReplacementTransform(row_steep, row_gentle), run_time=4)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(gentle_probe, gentle_path), FadeOut(caption_group_b), FadeIn(caption_group_c), run_time=5, rate_func=linear)
        self.wait(2)
        self.stop_ambient_camera_rotation()

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that explains a decision boundary crossing with a zoom window. Use an implicit boundary, a moving probe, and readable status panels so the class flip is obvious even near the crossing.
completion:
from manim import *

class ZoomedDecisionMarginStory(ZoomedScene):
    def __init__(self, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(zoom_factor=0.42, zoomed_display_height=2.5, zoomed_display_width=4.2, image_frame_stroke_width=9, zoomed_camera_config={"default_frame_stroke_width": 3}, **kwargs)

    def construct(self):
        def boundary_value(x, y):
            return ((x + 0.5) / 1.8) ** 2 + ((y - 0.2) / 1.1) ** 2 - 1.0

        title = Text("Zooming into a Decision Flip", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        plane = NumberPlane(x_range=[-4, 4, 1], y_range=[-3, 3, 1], background_line_style={"stroke_opacity": 0.24})
        boundary = ImplicitFunction(boundary_value, color=YELLOW_D, stroke_width=5)
        tracker = ValueTracker(-2.7)
        probe = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(np.array([tracker.get_value(), 0.25, 0]), color=TEAL_D if boundary_value(tracker.get_value(), 0.25) <= 0 else RED_D, radius=0.09))
        halo = always_redraw(lambda: Circle(radius=0.26, color=probe.get_color(), stroke_width=3).move_to(probe.get_center()))
        path = Line(np.array([-2.7, 0.25, 0]), np.array([1.9, 0.25, 0]), color=WHITE)
        inside_label = Text("class A region", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).move_to(LEFT * 2.6 + UP * 2.2)
        outside_label = Text("class B region", font_size=22, color=RED_D).move_to(RIGHT * 2.5 + UP * 2.2)
        caption_a = Text("The probe starts safely inside one class region.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("Near the boundary, the zoom panel makes the crossing readable instead of cramped.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("Once the sign changes, the status panel flips with the probe color too.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group_a = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_a, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_a)
        caption_group_b = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_b, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_b)
        caption_group_c = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_c, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_c)
        caption_group_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_group_c.set_opacity(0)

        def status_panel():
            status = Text("class A" if boundary_value(tracker.get_value(), 0.25) <= 0 else "class B", font_size=26, color=probe.get_color())
            status.to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.75)
            return VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(status, fill_opacity=0.92, buff=0.16), status)

        readout = always_redraw(status_panel)
        frame = self.zoomed_camera.frame
        display = self.zoomed_display
        display.shift(DOWN * 2.0)
        display.display_frame.set_color(PURPLE)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(plane), Create(boundary), FadeIn(inside_label), FadeIn(outside_label), FadeIn(caption_group_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(path), FadeIn(probe), Create(halo), FadeIn(readout), run_time=3)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(-0.8), run_time=4)
        frame.move_to(probe)
        frame.set_color(PURPLE)
        self.play(Create(frame), FadeOut(caption_group_a), FadeIn(caption_group_b), run_time=3)
        self.activate_zooming()
        self.play(self.get_zoomed_display_pop_out_animation(), run_time=3)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(0.9), run_time=4)
        pop_in = self.get_zoomed_display_pop_out_animation()
        self.play(pop_in, FadeOut(caption_group_b), FadeIn(caption_group_c), rate_func=lambda t: smooth(1 - t), run_time=3)
        self.play(tracker.animate.set_value(1.6), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that starts with a centered bar chart, isolates the dominant category, and ends on one large centered takeaway card. Avoid table morphs or cramped side summaries; the transitions should feel like a clean narrowing of attention.
completion:
from manim import *

class CenteredTransformSummaryStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("From Several Bars to One Clear Takeaway", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        chart = BarChart(values=[2, 5, 8, 3], bar_names=["A", "B", "C", "D"], y_range=[0, 10, 2], y_length=4.2, x_length=6.2, bar_colors=[BLUE_D, ORANGE, TEAL_D, GREEN_D]).move_to(ORIGIN + DOWN * 0.1)
        focus_box = SurroundingRectangle(chart.bars[2], color=TEAL_D, buff=0.12)
        fade_boxes = VGroup(*[SurroundingRectangle(chart.bars[i], color=GRAY_B, buff=0.08) for i in [0, 1, 3]])
        summary_lines = VGroup(Text("bucket C dominates", font_size=30, color=TEAL_D), Text("largest count: 8", font_size=26, color=WHITE), Text("all other buckets stay clearly below it", font_size=26, color=WHITE)).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.24)
        summary_card = VGroup(RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.18, width=7.0, height=3.2, color=TEAL_D, fill_color=BLUE_E, fill_opacity=0.14), summary_lines).move_to(ORIGIN + DOWN * 0.1)
        summary_highlight = SurroundingRectangle(summary_lines[0], color=TEAL_D, buff=0.12)
        caption_a = Text("The chart shows all four counts at once without making the viewer scan a table.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("We then isolate the tallest bar so the ranking becomes the only thing to read.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The final card keeps just the conclusion, centered and large enough to read immediately.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group_a = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_a, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_a)
        caption_group_b = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_b, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_b)
        caption_group_c = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_c, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_c)
        caption_group_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_group_c.set_opacity(0)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), FadeIn(chart), FadeIn(caption_group_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(focus_box), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(box) for box in fade_boxes], lag_ratio=0.15), FadeOut(caption_group_a), FadeIn(caption_group_b), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeOut(chart), FadeOut(focus_box), FadeOut(fade_boxes), FadeIn(summary_card), FadeOut(caption_group_b), FadeIn(caption_group_c), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(summary_highlight), Indicate(summary_lines[0]), run_time=3)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that explains a pipeline bottleneck and a bypass route. Use LaggedStart and AnimationGroup to reveal packets, arrows, and a bypass path in separate beats, and keep the queue explanation readable with a brace and staged captions.
completion:
from manim import *

class LaggedStartBypassBottleneckStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        title = Text("A Bypass Route Can Relieve a Bottleneck", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        stages = VGroup(*[RoundedRectangle(corner_radius=0.14, width=1.7, height=0.95, color=color, fill_opacity=0.16) for color in [BLUE_D, ORANGE, TEAL_D]]).arrange(RIGHT, buff=1.0).shift(UP * 0.45)
        labels = VGroup(Text("ingest", font_size=24), Text("queue", font_size=24), Text("serve", font_size=24))
        for label, stage in zip(labels, stages):
            label.move_to(stage)
        main_arrows = VGroup(*[Arrow(stages[i].get_right(), stages[i + 1].get_left(), buff=0.14, color=GRAY_B, stroke_width=4) for i in range(2)])
        packets = VGroup(*[Dot(color=YELLOW_D, radius=0.08) for _ in range(4)]).arrange(DOWN, buff=0.18).next_to(stages[1], LEFT, buff=0.4)
        queue_brace = Brace(packets, LEFT, color=ORANGE)
        queue_text = Text("queue builds here", font_size=22, color=ORANGE).next_to(queue_brace, LEFT, buff=0.15)
        bypass = CubicBezier(stages[0].get_top() + UP * 0.18, stages[0].get_top() + UP * 1.1, stages[2].get_top() + UP * 1.1, stages[2].get_top() + UP * 0.18).set_stroke(color=TEAL_D, width=5)
        bypass_label = Text("bypass lane", font_size=22, color=TEAL_D).next_to(bypass, UP, buff=0.08)
        probe = Dot(stages[0].get_left() + LEFT * 0.7, color=YELLOW, radius=0.09)
        main_path = VMobject(color=YELLOW_D)
        main_path.set_points_smoothly([probe.get_center(), stages[0].get_center(), stages[1].get_center(), stages[2].get_center(), stages[2].get_right() + RIGHT * 0.7])
        bypass_path = VMobject(color=TEAL_D)
        bypass_path.set_points_smoothly([stages[0].get_center(), stages[0].get_top() + UP * 0.7, stages[2].get_top() + UP * 0.7, stages[2].get_center()])
        caption_a = Text("First the packets follow the main route, and the middle stage starts to fill up.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("The brace makes the queue visible instead of leaving the delay as an invisible claim.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("A bypass route shortens the path for urgent packets and relieves the crowded center.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group_a = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_a, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_a)
        caption_group_b = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_b, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_b)
        caption_group_c = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_c, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_c)
        caption_group_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_group_c.set_opacity(0)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(stage) for stage in stages], *[Write(label) for label in labels], lag_ratio=0.14), FadeIn(probe), run_time=4)
        self.play(AnimationGroup(*[GrowArrow(arrow) for arrow in main_arrows], lag_ratio=0.22), FadeIn(caption_group_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(LaggedStart(*[FadeIn(packet) for packet in packets], lag_ratio=0.14), FadeIn(queue_brace), FadeIn(queue_text), MoveAlongPath(probe, main_path), FadeOut(caption_group_a), FadeIn(caption_group_b), run_time=5)
        self.play(Create(bypass), FadeIn(bypass_label), FadeOut(caption_group_b), FadeIn(caption_group_c), run_time=4)
        self.play(MoveAlongPath(probe, bypass_path), Indicate(bypass, color=TEAL_A), run_time=5)
        self.wait(2)

prompt: Create a 30-second Manim scene that explains a rightward demand shift against a fixed supply curve. Track the equilibrium point and keep the price and quantity readout in a readable panel with a background so the labels never disappear into the graph.
completion:
from manim import *

class SupplyDemandEquilibriumPanelStory(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        shift_tracker = ValueTracker(0.0)

        def supply(x):
            return 1.0 + 0.55 * x

        def demand(x):
            return 7.0 - 0.62 * x + shift_tracker.get_value()

        def equilibrium_x():
            return (6.0 + shift_tracker.get_value()) / 1.17

        def equilibrium_y():
            return supply(equilibrium_x())

        title = Text("A Demand Shift Moves the Equilibrium", font_size=34).to_edge(UP)
        axes = Axes(x_range=[0, 8, 1], y_range=[0, 8, 1], x_length=7.2, y_length=4.8, tips=False).shift(LEFT * 1.4 + DOWN * 0.2)
        axis_labels = axes.get_axis_labels(Text("quantity", font_size=22), Text("price", font_size=22))
        supply_graph = axes.plot(supply, x_range=[0.3, 7.5], color=BLUE_D)
        demand_graph = always_redraw(lambda: axes.plot(lambda x: 7.0 - 0.62 * x + shift_tracker.get_value(), x_range=[0.3, 7.5], color=ORANGE))
        eq_point = always_redraw(lambda: Dot(axes.c2p(equilibrium_x(), equilibrium_y()), color=YELLOW, radius=0.08))
        vline = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(equilibrium_x(), 0), eq_point.get_center(), color=WHITE, stroke_width=3))
        hline = always_redraw(lambda: DashedLine(axes.c2p(0, equilibrium_y()), eq_point.get_center(), color=WHITE, stroke_width=3))
        supply_label = Text("supply", font_size=22, color=BLUE_D).move_to(axes.c2p(6.7, supply(6.7)) + RIGHT * 0.5)
        demand_label = always_redraw(lambda: Text("demand", font_size=22, color=ORANGE).move_to(axes.c2p(6.0, demand(6.0)) + RIGHT * 0.55))

        def panel_group():
            panel_text = VGroup(
                Text("equilibrium", font_size=21, color=WHITE),
                Text(f"P = {equilibrium_y():.2f}", font_size=25, color=YELLOW_D),
                Text(f"Q = {equilibrium_x():.2f}", font_size=25, color=YELLOW_D),
            ).arrange(DOWN, aligned_edge=LEFT, buff=0.12)
            panel_text.to_corner(UR).shift(DOWN * 0.75)
            return VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(panel_text, fill_opacity=0.92, buff=0.18), panel_text)

        panel = always_redraw(panel_group)
        caption_a = Text("The original demand curve meets supply at one equilibrium point.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_b = Text("When demand shifts right, both equilibrium quantity and price move upward.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_c = Text("The panel keeps the numerical readout readable instead of burying it inside the graph lines.", font_size=22, color=WHITE).to_edge(DOWN)
        caption_group_a = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_a, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_a)
        caption_group_b = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_b, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_b)
        caption_group_c = VGroup(BackgroundRectangle(caption_c, fill_opacity=0.9, buff=0.16), caption_c)
        caption_group_b.set_opacity(0)
        caption_group_c.set_opacity(0)

        self.play(FadeIn(title), Create(axes), FadeIn(axis_labels), Create(supply_graph), FadeIn(supply_label), FadeIn(caption_group_a), run_time=4)
        self.play(Create(demand_graph), FadeIn(demand_label), FadeIn(eq_point), Create(vline), Create(hline), FadeIn(panel), run_time=4)
        self.play(shift_tracker.animate.set_value(0.9), FadeOut(caption_group_a), FadeIn(caption_group_b), run_time=6)
        self.play(shift_tracker.animate.set_value(1.4), run_time=4)
        self.play(FadeOut(caption_group_b), FadeIn(caption_group_c), Indicate(panel[1][1], color=YELLOW_A), Indicate(panel[1][2], color=YELLOW_A), run_time=4)
        self.wait(2)
